textByHash.1072798a0e4534245e3197722e357f5113478538: Yes. What is it to you?
textByHash.47393c65c4acb328df08d53741760e897b58bde3: What? No! These are my robes!
textByHash.62efb2648aba28eb795ae308274237aba7b7f59c: What? Oh well, if it's a matter of that much importance, I suppose you can borrow one...
textByHash.917efd8d202268ce5017677af15f58c802689dfc: You monster! Take the robes and leave this place!
textByHash.c69bcccc2636e64f8d2cdeade12cae22c1ad6b01: Blood stains is it... Well, the soap I use can clean almost any stain.
textByHash.5f15a63e579a79848f10e99afa01968815a93305: No, I don't have very much soap left and I still have lots to get clean.
textByHash.64aad69578c38fa26b7d2f32ae8be13891ac49b6: You can't... I make it to my own secret recipe.
textByHash.dda7b77c09c2278a2f2801b5e1f4645fdabce56a: Like you were, taking those robes from my washing line?? So yes, if you know a way I can be less helpful just tell me. I'll try it.
